howItWorks.intro: This drain slope calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Total Drop = Slope per Foot × Pipe Length
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: What slope do drain pipes need?
faq.answer: Pipes 3 inches and larger need 1/8 inch per foot minimum. Pipes under 3 inches need 1/4 inch per foot. Too little slope causes clogs; too much and water outruns solids.
